summary: Dashboard Navigation Context Feature Testing Complete - All 4 features verified successfully. Login works, 'Coming Up' card navigates to ClientManagement and auto-opens client profile, 'Inactive Clients' alert navigates with filter applied showing banner, and 'Show All Clients' button clears the filter.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - non-critical, doesn't affect dashboard navigation

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard navigation context feature fully tested. Key data-testids verified: view-client-profile-btn (Coming Up card), alert-action-0 (Inactive Clients alert), inactive-filter-banner, clear-filter-btn. All navigation flows working correctly.

coming_up_card_navigation.notes: Clicking 'View Client Profile' navigates to ClientManagement and auto-opens the client's profile modal

inactive_clients_alert_navigation.notes: Clicking 'View Clients' from inactive alert navigates to ClientManagement with filter applied

inactive_filter_banner.notes: Banner displays 'Showing inactive clients (no sessions in 30+ days)' with 'Show All Clients' button

clear_filter_button.notes: 'Show All Clients' button clears the inactive filter and shows all clients
